query:
UPDATE
    account
SET
    allowance = greatest(
        allowance - (
            $3 + CASE
                WHEN $4 THEN coalesce(pending_inner_spend, 0)
                ELSE 0
            END
        ),
        0
    ),
    pending_operation_key = NULL,
    pending_inner_spend = NULL
WHERE
    account_id = $1
    AND pending_operation_key = $2
